description: A woman in a black dress presents an award to a man in a fire department dress uniform on stage, while a man in a tuxedo with red bow tie stands at a podium. Band equipment including drums labeled 'BOUNCE' is visible behind them.
people_description: Woman presenter in black cocktail dress, fire department officer in dress uniform with gold stripes, male emcee in black tuxedo with red bow tie at podium

description: A formal group photo of approximately 20 award honorees and guests, including military service members in dress uniforms, a soldier in a wheelchair in Army dress greens, and women in evening gowns.
people_description: Military service members in various dress uniforms, men in tuxedos, women in formal evening gowns, a wounded warrior in Army greens seated in a wheelchair at center

description: On stage, a woman in a black dress leans down to present an award to a young boy in a blue dress shirt and red tie, while a male emcee in a tuxedo with red bow tie stands at the podium. Band drum kit visible behind.
people_description: Woman presenter in black cocktail dress, young boy in blue shirt and red tie receiving award, male emcee in black tuxedo with red bow tie

description: A youth color guard in navy blue Civil War-era Buffalo Soldier uniforms with gold trim marches through a ballroom carrying raised sabers. Star-shaped lighting in blue and green is projected on the walls.
people_description: Youth color guard members in navy blue Buffalo Soldier uniforms with gold sashes, white gloves, and kepis, carrying sabers; surrounded by formally dressed adult guests

description: Seven formally dressed guests posing together at the ball. A man in the center wears a Medal of Honor around his neck. Women wear red, black, gold, and white evening attire.
people_description: Seven adults in formal attire; center man wearing a Medal of Honor on blue ribbon, women in red satin, black, gold, and white evening wear

description: Wider view of the youth Buffalo Soldier color guard forming a saber arch in the ballroom as a couple passes beneath. Blue and green star projections light the walls.
people_description: Youth color guard in navy Buffalo Soldier uniforms forming a saber arch, a couple walking through, formally dressed guests watching

description: Youth Buffalo Soldier color guard stands in formation with a flag bearer at center holding a red and white flag. Red and blue star-shaped lighting projected across the walls and ceiling.
people_description: Youth color guard in navy blue Buffalo Soldier uniforms with gold trim; central flag bearer holding a red and white guidon

description: Guests stream through the venue entrance beneath a large red, white, and blue balloon arch. A patriotic bunting banner hangs above, and the multi-level atrium lobby is bustling with arriving guests.
people_description: Formally dressed guests arriving in evening gowns and tuxedos, a security guard in uniform at left

description: Five young women in colorful formal dresses pose together smiling at the ball. Other guests mingle in background, some with patriotic accessories. One guest holds a small American flag.
people_description: Five young women in formal dresses (blue, green, floral, black lace, black), additional guests mingling in background with patriotic accessories

description: Two couples seated together, smiling warmly. Men wear black tuxedos with bow ties, women in black evening dresses. One woman wears a patriotic star-spangled tiara.
people_description: Two couples in formal black-tie attire; one woman wearing a patriotic star tiara, men in tuxedos with bow ties

description: Three young guests pose together wearing patriotic Uncle Sam top hats. The man in the center wears a suit and tie while the two women flank him in formal black dresses.
people_description: One young man in a suit and two young women in black formal dresses, all wearing red-white-and-blue Uncle Sam hats

description: Four well-dressed guests seated together smiling and laughing at the 2017 All American Ball. Two men in tuxedos and two women in formal attire.
people_description: Two men in black tuxedos and two women in formal dresses, appearing to have a great time

description: Five distinguished guests pose at the 2017 Ball, including two military officers in decorated dress uniforms with medals, a woman in a blue gown, and two men in formal black-tie attire.
people_description: Two military officers in decorated dress uniforms, one woman in a blue evening gown, two men in black-tie formal wear

description: A military honor guard member in a historic blue dress uniform raises a ceremonial sword overhead. Red star-shaped lighting projections illuminate the ballroom wall behind him.
people_description: One military honor guard in period blue uniform with sword raised, formally dressed guests visible in background
